title: Challenge My Chart Analysis App
author: Careless-Equal6722
selftext:
I built an AI tool called [Chartscopeai.org](http://Chartscopeai.org) Pro that analyzes chart screenshots and explains what’s happening technically.

Give me any chart screenshot (crypto /stocks/ Gold or any asset).

Any timeframe.

I’ll run it through the app and post the full analysis here.

Educational only — no trade advice.

Let’s see how it performs.

comments.author: cherry-pick-crew
comments.body: Pretty solid if you ask me

comments.author: cherry-pick-crew
comments.body: If you want to automate your trades check out [useagentbase.dev](https://useagentbase.dev)

replies.author: Careless-Equal6722
replies.body: I am ok I have my own app

comments.author: Careless-Equal6722
comments.body:
📍 Try It Free

Anyone can upload charts and try a free trial — no commitment:

👉 https://chartscopeai.org



💬 Would love to hear feedback from chart traders here! What indicators do you use most often? And how would AI help your workflow?
